Text.Page: I don't care what Digory says—the grain should go to the people who are going hungry because of his killer golems ruining the harvest. If you disagree, just walk on by.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"No, I agree with you."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

Good. The bad news is, a runaway golem wrecked the cart.

I'll need you to keep the {@LinkCreature:19#3000#horned war hyenas} if there's going to be any chance of fixing it."Of course."
Wonderful. Take care of as many as you can while I see how bad the damage is.

Thanks for handling the hyenas for me.

Unfortunately, I'm not going to be able to fix the cart by myself.
